data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/georg-schmidt-photography-hue/scroll-world-assets/main/stills/scene1-komplex.png\"],\"aspect_ratio\":\"3:2\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Origami papercraft diorama, isometric aerial view, everything folded from clean matte paper, tilt-shift miniature feel, plain white background with soft contact shadow, centered composition. Next to it a smaller RED paper van of the independent electrician company with the lettering \\\"Elektro Müller\\\" and a small white hexagon logo with a red lightning bolt - the red van is the ONLY red object in the scene.
